context.requirement: 在task06/task07基础上，实现LocalLLMProvider（本地模型）+ 完整自动降级逻辑：1) 在services/llm_service.py中新增LocalLLMProvider类（继承LLMProvider），支持用户本机部署开源模型(Qwen2-7B/Qwen2-1.5B等Transformers兼容模型)；2) 实现LLMService完整自动降级逻辑：initialize()中三路Provider按优先级初始化(AUTO模式)，generate()/generate_stream()中运行时降级(_fallback方法)；3) 实现降级状态跟踪(_degradation_state)和定时恢复机制(_recovery_task)；4) 在events.py shutdown中添加LLM模型释放(unload_model)；5) 更新.env.example添加方案C本地模型配置说明。

relevant_modules.name: LocalLLMProvider
relevant_modules.responsibility: 本地模型Provider（最低优先级），支持用户本机部署Transformers兼容模型

key_interfaces.name: load_model
key_interfaces.description: 异步加载本地模型：from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM, AutoTokenizer；self.tokenizer=AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(model_path)；self.model=AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(model_path, torch_dtype='auto', device_map='auto')。使用run_in_executor避免阻塞事件循环

key_interfaces.name: generate
key_interfaces.signature: async def generate(self, prompt: str, max_tokens: int = 2048, temperature: float = 0.7) -> str
key_interfaces.description: 本地推理：tokenizer.encode → model.generate(max_new_tokens, temperature, do_sample=True) → tokenizer.decode(skip_special_tokens=True)。使用run_in_executor包装CPU密集操作

key_interfaces.name: generate_stream
key_interfaces.signature: async def generate_stream(self, prompt: str, max_tokens: int = 2048, temperature: float = 0.7) -> AsyncIterator[str]
key_interfaces.description: 流式生成：使用TextIteratorStreamer + threading.Thread实现，async for遍历streamer产出token

key_interfaces.name: unload_model
key_interfaces.description: 释放GPU显存：del self.model, del self.tokenizer, gc.collect(), torch.cuda.empty_cache()

relevant_modules.name: LLMService降级逻辑
relevant_modules.responsibility: 完整的三路自动降级机制：initialize()启动时降级 + generate()运行时降级 + 定时恢复

key_interfaces.name: initialize
key_interfaces.description: 完整三路初始化：1)BuiltinLLMProvider(优先级1)；2)APILLMProvider(优先级2)；3)LocalLLMProvider(优先级3，需await load_model())。AUTO模式按顺序尝试，至少一路成功即可。强制模式仅初始化指定Provider

key_interfaces.name: _fallback
key_interfaces.description: 运行时降级：按priority=['builtin','api','local']顺序查找下一个可用Provider，test_connection验证后切换active_provider，记录WARNING日志

key_interfaces.name: generate(增强)
key_interfaces.signature: async def generate(self, prompt: str, max_tokens: int = 2048, temperature: float = 0.7) -> str
key_interfaces.description: 增强版：try active_provider.generate()，失败时await _fallback()降级后重试一次。记录降级事件到_degradation_state

key_interfaces.name: _degradation_state
key_interfaces.description: 降级状态跟踪：{current_provider, fallback_count, last_fallback_at, consecutive_failures}。连续3次失败触发降级

key_interfaces.name: _start_recovery_task
key_interfaces.description: 启动后台定时恢复任务：每5分钟尝试恢复到更高级别Provider。使用asyncio.create_task

files_to_modify.description: 新增LocalLLMProvider类；完善LLMService.initialize()三路降级；实现_fallback()运行时降级；实现_degradation_state跟踪；实现_recovery_task定时恢复；增强generate()/generate_stream()降级重试
on_shutdown()中添加llm_service.unload_model()调用（释放本地模型GPU显存）
补充方案C本地模型配置说明：Qwen2-7B(需GPU≥16GB)/Qwen2-1.5B(CPU可运行)等示例

functional_requirements.description: LocalLLMProvider(LLMProvider)：mode属性返回'local'。__init__校验settings.LLM_LOCAL_MODEL_PATH非空，为空则raise ValueError('LLM_LOCAL_MODEL_PATH is required for local provider')。初始化self.model=None, self.tokenizer=None, self.model_path=settings.LLM_LOCAL_MODEL_PATH

LocalLLMProvider.load_model()异步方法：使用asyncio.get_event_loop().run_in_executor(None, self._sync_load_model)包装同步加载。_sync_load_model中：from transformers import AutoModelForCausalLM, AutoTokenizer；self.tokenizer=AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(self.model_path)；self.model=AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(self.model_path, torch_dtype='auto', device_map='auto')。加载成功logger.info(f'Local model loaded: {self.model_path}')
functional_requirements.acceptance_condition: 配置有效模型路径后load_model()成功加载，self.model和self.tokenizer非空

functional_requirements.description: LocalLLMProvider.generate()异步方法：使用run_in_executor包装同步推理。同步部分：inputs=self.tokenizer(prompt, return_tensors='pt').to(self.model.device)；outputs=self.model.generate(**inputs, max_new_tokens=max_tokens, temperature=temperature, do_sample=True)；return self.tokenizer.decode(outputs[0][inputs.input_ids.shape[1]:], skip_special_tokens=True)
functional_requirements.acceptance_condition: 本地模型加载后generate('Hello')返回非空字符串

functional_requirements.description: LocalLLMProvider.generate_stream()异步方法：使用transformers.TextIteratorStreamer + threading.Thread实现流式生成。创建streamer=TextIteratorStreamer(self.tokenizer, skip_special_tokens=True)，启动Thread执行model.generate(**inputs, streamer=streamer, ...)，async for text in streamer yield text（使用asyncio.to_thread或queue适配）
functional_requirements.acceptance_condition: 本地模型加载后generate_stream()逐Token产出

functional_requirements.description: LocalLLMProvider.test_connection()：检查self.model和self.tokenizer均非空返回True，否则raise ModelNotLoadedException('Local model not loaded')
functional_requirements.acceptance_condition: 模型加载后test_connection()返回True；未加载时抛出ModelNotLoadedException

functional_requirements.description: LocalLLMProvider.unload_model()异步方法：del self.model, del self.tokenizer, self.model=None, self.tokenizer=None；import gc; gc.collect()；if torch.cuda.is_available(): torch.cuda.empty_cache()。logger.info('Local model unloaded, GPU memory released')

LLMService.initialize()完整三路降级：在现有Builtin+API逻辑之后，当mode为AUTO或LOCAL时：1)检查LLM_LOCAL_MODEL_PATH非空；2)try创建LocalLLMProvider并await load_model()和test_connection()；3)成功则self.providers['local']=provider；4)若active_provider仍为None则设为local provider；5)失败则logger.warning。最终检查：若active_provider仍为None则self._status='error'，raise RuntimeError('No LLM provider available')
functional_requirements.acceptance_condition: AUTO模式下三路均不可用时抛出RuntimeError；至少一路可用时status='loaded'

functional_requirements.description: LLMService._fallback()运行时降级：按priority=['builtin','api','local']顺序，跳过current provider，对每个可用provider try await test_connection()，成功则切换active_provider，logger.warning(f'LLM fallback: {current} → {new}')，更新_degradation_state，return。所有provider均不可用则raise LLMException('All LLM providers failed')
functional_requirements.acceptance_condition: Builtin失败后_fallback()切换到API provider；API也失败则切换到Local

functional_requirements.description: LLMService.generate()增强降级重试：try await self.active_provider.generate()，except Exception时：1)logger.error(f'LLM generation failed: {e}')；2)更新_degradation_state(consecutive_failures+1)；3)若consecutive_failures<3则await self._fallback()降级后重试一次；4)重试仍失败则raise LLMException。generate_stream()同理
functional_requirements.acceptance_condition: active_provider调用失败时自动降级到下一个provider重试

functional_requirements.description: LLMService._degradation_state跟踪：初始化为{current_provider: None, fallback_count: 0, last_fallback_at: None, consecutive_failures: {provider_name: 0}}。每次降级更新fallback_count和last_fallback_at。连续3次失败触发自动降级
functional_requirements.acceptance_condition: 降级事件被正确记录在_degradation_state中

functional_requirements.description: LLMService._start_recovery_task()定时恢复：使用asyncio.create_task启动后台协程，每300秒(5分钟)尝试恢复到更高级别Provider。从当前active_provider向上查找，test_connection成功则切换回去，logger.info(f'LLM recovered: {low} → {high}')。恢复失败则静默继续等待下次
functional_requirements.acceptance_condition: 降级后5分钟内若高级别Provider恢复则自动切回

functional_requirements.description: events.py on_shutdown()更新：若llm_service非空，调用await llm_service.unload_model()释放本地模型GPU显存
functional_requirements.acceptance_condition: 服务关闭时日志显示 'Local model unloaded, GPU memory released'

providers.name: LocalLLMProvider
providers.description: 本地开源模型（本任务实现）

llm_degradation.recovery_strategy: 每5分钟尝试恢复到更高级别Provider，test_connection成功则切回

security_requirements.requirement: 本地模型路径通过环境变量注入。日志中不输出敏感信息

python.rule: Router → Service → Agent，逻辑不在路由函数中

python.approach: try-except，LLM调用失败触发降级，所有Provider失败抛出LLMException

prohibited: 在循环中打印INFO及以上级别日志
在日志中输出敏感信息（密码、Token、API Key）

security.auth_mechanism: JWT Token (24h有效期) + Redis黑名单

forbidden_actions.reason: 必须输出完整可执行代码

forbidden_actions.action: 修改需求范围外的模块

forbidden_actions.reason: 模型加载是CPU/IO密集操作，必须使用run_in_executor
模型推理是CPU密集操作，必须使用run_in_executor
路径为空时Provider无意义，应跳过
task06/07已实现的代码不应被本任务修改
所有Provider失败时必须有明确错误处理，不能静默失败

unit_tests.description: mock transformers加载过程，验证load_model()成功后model和tokenizer非空
mock model和tokenizer，验证generate()正确调用model.generate并返回解码文本
mock三个Provider，验证AUTO模式下按优先级初始化：Builtin成功则使用Builtin；Builtin失败API成功则使用API；都失败Local成功则使用Local；都失败抛出RuntimeError
mock active_provider.generate()抛出异常，验证_fallback()切换到下一个可用Provider
验证降级事件被正确记录在_degradation_state中(fallback_count, last_fallback_at)
mock所有Provider均失败，验证generate()抛出LLMException('All LLM providers failed')

verification_commands.command: cd Veritas/ai-service && python -c "from app.services.llm_service import LocalLLMProvider, LLMService; from app.core.config import settings; print('OK')"

acceptance_criteria.criterion: load_model()使用run_in_executor避免阻塞事件循环
generate()失败时自动降级重试一次
_recovery_task每5分钟尝试恢复到更高级别Provider
